scope: Real runtime visual inspection and cinematic iteration on /lens-v2-flagship

checks.name: target_route_inspected_is_lens_v2_flagship
checks.description: All Playwright captures and signals were taken from /lens-v2-flagship, not from / or app/gauge-product or any other route.
checks.notes: Confirmed via Playwright page URL on every capture; all screenshots in inspection_runs are from /lens-v2-flagship.

checks.name: app_inspected_is_execlens_demo
checks.description: All edits and inspection targeted app/execlens-demo, not app/gauge-product.
checks.notes: Source edits confined to app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js. No edits anywhere else in app/.

checks.name: screenshots_captured_successfully
checks.description: 12 screenshots captured: 3 viewports (1728x1117, 1440x900, 1280x800), 2 capture types (full-page + viewport), 2 phases (before + after).

checks.name: before_after_comparison_completed
checks.description: Mechanical signals extracted both before and after refinement; documented in BEFORE_AFTER_COMPARISON_MATRIX and rubric_results.
checks.notes: 12 mechanical signals captured pre and post. All deltas recorded.

checks.name: rubric_results_json_created
checks.description: rubric_results.json produced with six-axis before/after evaluation and overall verdict.
checks.notes: File exists; before overall = REDESIGN, after overall = PASS.

checks.name: dashboard_syndrome_audit_completed
checks.description: DASHBOARD_SYNDROME_AUDIT.md produced with primary and secondary tests per detection guide.
checks.notes: 9 detection tests documented; before verdict FAIL, after verdict PASS.

checks.name: terminology_normalization_preserved
checks.description: No reintroduction of L7, 51.x, demo/narrative layer, or demo / narrative layer terminology in any deliverable or source change.
checks.method: grep -rn -E '\bL7\b|51\.x|demo/narrative|demo / narrative' against this stream's deliverables and modified source.
checks.notes: Re-grep returned zero matches in the stream's added/modified files. Note: pre-existing strings outside this stream's scope remain unchanged per scope rule.

checks.name: no_governance_mutation
checks.description: No changes to docs/governance/, validators, or any governance contract.
checks.notes: git diff confirms changes are scoped to docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.PLAYWRIGHT-VISUAL-INSPECTION.01/, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.PLAYWRIGHT-VISUAL-INSPECTION.01/, and app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.

checks.name: no_evidence_semantic_mutation
checks.description: No changes to evidence semantics, signal interpretation, render-state vocabulary, qualifier-class semantics, or governance ribbon pass/fail logic.
checks.notes: All edits in pages/lens-v2-flagship.js are visual-composition / typography / atmosphere only. Render-state vocabulary (EXECUTIVE_READY / EXECUTIVE_READY_WITH_QUALIFIER / DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY / BLOCKED) preserved verbatim. Qualifier-class semantics (Q-00 / Q-01) preserved. Orchestration module untouched. Fixtures untouched.

checks.name: no_unrelated_surface_mutation
checks.description: No edits to app/gauge-product, no edits to other routes within app/execlens-demo, no edits to unrelated frontend surfaces.
checks.notes: git diff confirms exactly one source file modified: app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.
